title: uraria lagocephala
intro: Uraria lagocephala, also known as the "Indian target leaf" or "vallary", is a perennial herb belonging to the family Fabaceae. The medicinal properties of Uraria lagocephala lie in its ability to exhibit antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic properties, which are used to treat a variety of health conditions. The health benefits of Uraria lagocephala include its potential to reduce blood pressure, alleviate urinary tract infections, and exhibit anti-cancer properties. Uraria lagocephala is traditionally prepared as a herbal decoction or infusion, and is also used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various ailments.
